goal: ML-KEM (FIPS 203): lattice-based key encapsulation; quantum-safe membrane for QA agent channels; deploy now per NIST.
failure_modes: Implementation side-channel — must use constant-time polynomial arithmetic
Parameter set downgrade (use ML-KEM-768 or ML-KEM-1024 for high-security contexts)
composition_rules: Hybrid mode: X25519+ML-KEM for transition (TLS 1.3 hybrid KEX — X25519MLKEM768)
Follow with HKDF to derive symmetric session keys from shared secret
NIST: deploy now — FIPS 203 final since August 2024
